_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description:
You can:
- ensure the organisation’s technical architecture is appropriately resilient to cyber threats and attacks and has appropriate recovery mechanisms
- oversee the use of processes, tools, platforms and other practices needed to effectively implement secure technical architecture
- ensure your supply chain is managing cyber risk based on the level of risk your organisation accepts
Examples of leadership using this skill:
- educating senior leaders on the importance of security in the development of services and products
- deciding when exceptions to security policy and processes are allowed
- getting support for investment to ensure appropriate security in the organisation’s supply chain
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-013 (SP, cosine: 0.514), SP-T-009 (SP, cosine: 0.513).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.483). Shared vocabulary: [security]. DDaT-only terms [accepts, allowed, appropriate, appropriately, architecture, attacks] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.832 (P=0.821, R=0.844). R exceeds P by 0.023 — the WIDAI KSA's 22 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 104 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance:
NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "You can:
- ensure the organisation’s technical architecture is appropriately res" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.500 ≈ STS 0.483 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.0%. Shared tokens: [security]. DDaT-only: [accepts, allowed, appropriate, appropriately, architecture, attacks]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise].
